headline: UnitedHealth Group Deal For Alegeus Highlights Push Into Benefits Technology
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) has agreed to acquire healthcare technology platform Alegeus Technologies. The transaction is expected to close in the second half of 2026, subject to closing conditions. Alegeus provides technology focused on consumer directed benefits and health account administration. UnitedHealth Group runs a large managed care and health services business, with a focus on digital tools and data driven solutions. Adding Alegeus Technologies fits into that broader push...

headline: UnitedHealth and Humana Soar in April: Which Healthcare Stock Is Winning and Why
